content:
# Best AI Writing Tools for Business Plans in 2026

A great business plan is essential for success, but writing one takes time. AI tools help you create professional plans faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Fast Business Plan Drafting

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you draft business plan sections quickly.

### Rytr for Business Plans
- **Business plan templates**: Structured sections that work
- **Financial section help**: Explain your numbers clearly
- **Professional tone**: Sound like a pro

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

## Grammarly: Polish Your Business Plan

Grammarly ensures your business plan is error-free and professional.

### Grammarly for Business Plans

- **Professional tone**: Sound confident
